title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">✅</font> Positive &amp negative pulses driv
content:
✅ Positive & negative pulses drive tension. A story is built on rising and falling energy.
✅ The wave structure matters. Look at how moments build and collapse in a rhythmic way.
✅ Exploratory writing is MESSY. No one sees the first draft. Don’t judge it—just get ideas out.
✅ Keep the conversation going. Let’s keep refining ideas through email back-and-forth.

Would Derek prefer this as a PDF guide for reference? Let me know, and I can format this into something polished!
context: From document: Essential Storytelling Principles for Derek — chunk 5 (chunk 5/5)
